description_long: This house features a rectangular layout with a stone brick exterior and large, brown-framed windows distributed across all visible sides. The front facade includes a double-door entryway flanked by two potted plants and several window flower boxes, giving it a welcoming appearance. The structure has a flat roof, with a spacious terrace on one side, decorated with potted plants and outdoor furniture, suggesting a comfortable outdoor living area. The house appears to have a single story, with multiple rooms visible through the open roof, including a kitchen, living area, and bedrooms. The rear side includes a garage door beneath the terrace, indicating integrated parking. The overall design is modern with subtle traditional elements, and the window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, enhancing its urban residential appeal.
description: A modern, single-story stone house with large windows, a flat roof, a front entryway with potted plants, and a terrace with outdoor seating and greenery. The design includes a garage and symmetrical window placement, blending comfort and urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, potted plants, and symmetrical windows with flower boxes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone wall with minimal windows and a glimpse into the interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the terrace with outdoor furniture and plants, as well as additional windows and the garage door below.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the terrace area, garage door, and the arrangement of rooms inside the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Double wooden doors with side potted plants, small steps, and window flower boxes above.
